revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{relation|}}}|[https://openstreetmap.org/relation/{{{relation}}} {{{relation}}}]|{{#switch: {{{1}}} | n = [https://openstreetmap.org/node/{{{2}}} {{{2}}}] | w = [https://openstreetmap.org/way/{{{2}}} {{{2}}}] | r = [https://openstreetmap.org/relation/{{{2}}} {{{2}}}] ([https://api.openstreetmap.org/api/0.6/relation/{{{2}}} x] [http://betaplace.emaitie.de/webapps.relation-analyzer/analyze.jsp?relationId={{{2}}} a] [http://localhost:8111/import?url=http://api.openstreetmap.org/api/0.6/relation/{{{2}}} j] [http://osm.virtuelle-loipe.de/history/?type=relation&ref={{{2}}} h])}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}} on [[OpenStreetMap]]}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:OpenStreetMap templates]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:OSM]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.text: {{#if:{{{relation|}}}|[https://openstreetmap.org/relation/{{{relation}}} {{{relation}}}]|{{#switch: {{{1}}} | n = [https://openstreetmap.org/node/{{{2}}} {{{2}}}] | w = [https://openstreetmap.org/way/{{{2}}} {{{2}}}] | r = [https://openstreetmap.org/relation/{{{2}}} {{{2}}}] ([https://api.openstreetmap.org/api/0.6/relation/{{{2}}} x] [http://betaplace.emaitie.de/webapps.relation-analyzer/analyze.jsp?relationId={{{2}}} a] [http://localhost:8111/import?url=http://api.openstreetmap.org/api/0.6/relation/{{{2}}} j] [http://osm.virtuelle-loipe.de/history/?type=relation&ref={{{2}}} h])}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}} on [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]]}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:OpenStreetMap templates]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
